__Auth_note: SigningKey (32+ chars) signs issued sessions — set a real secret per deployment. SeedAdmin creates a first email/password user on startup if no users exist yet (so a deployment isn't locked out). Leave blank to skip; locally the loopback bypass means you're always signed in.
__Oidc_note: Fill these in to require SSO for non-loopback access. Leave Authority empty and the dashboard is only reachable over loopback (local dev / kubectl port-forward).
